name: Firearms Components
rationale: Existing ZOLLERN market. Active constraints: C9 (IH length range), C13 (ITAR/EAR export control), C7 (min batch), C8 (tooling lead). ZOLLERN wins 14/25 needs but net weighted delta -126 due to tooling flexibility losses. Strong on dimensional precision and traceability; weak on prototype access and tooling recovery.
entryStrategy: Reference only - existing market. Focus on repeat-geometry military and LE programs where die investment is amortized.
